description: The Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi is a yakuza organization based in Hyogo, Japan, formed in 2015 after breaking away from the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi. It was founded by Kunio Inoue and initially had 2,800 members, but membership declined to around 140 by 2023 due to splits and disbandments. The group has been designated as a crime syndicate by authorities and is involved in various criminal activities.
